title: cota tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria
intro: Cota tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria, also known as the wood betony or lesser betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cota tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antacid to soothe digestive issues. Cota tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
